text.title: AI-Generated Dockerfile Red-Flag List Core Rules
text.summary: 7 testable rules with rationale + source for ai-dockerfile-redflag-list. Includes terminal skip-this-methodology rule.

rule.statement: Base images MUST be pinned to digest (`@sha256:...`) or a fully-qualified semver tag — never `:latest`, `:edge`, `:stable`, or a bare repo name.
rule.rationale: CIS Docker Benchmark 4.1 (image versioning) + supply-chain attacks on tag mutability (codecov-style).

rule.statement: Final image MUST set a non-root `USER` before `CMD` / `ENTRYPOINT`. Builder stage may be root for layer caching, but the runtime stage must not.
rule.rationale: CIS Docker Benchmark 4.1 + Kubernetes Pod Security Standards (restricted profile).

rule.statement: Dockerfile MUST NOT contain `curl ... | sh`, `wget ... | bash`, or `Invoke-WebRequest ... | iex`. Installer scripts must be fetched, checksummed, then executed.
rule.rationale: Snyk 2024 supply-chain report — fetch-and-exec is the #1 image-time vector.

rule.statement: `ARG` values whose names match `*_TOKEN|*_KEY|*_PASS|*_SECRET` MUST NOT exist; secrets pass via BuildKit `--mount=type=secret` only.
rule.rationale: Docker BuildKit docs + GitGuardian 2024 — ARGs are baked into image history.

rule.statement: Image MUST declare a `HEALTHCHECK` instruction or document an orchestrator-level probe that supersedes it; both absent is a fail.
rule.rationale: Docker reference docs — healthcheck is the only signal orchestrators trust without app-level instrumentation.

rule.statement: Images that compile or install language toolchains MUST be multi-stage; the final stage MUST NOT contain compilers, package managers, or shells beyond busybox unless explicitly justified.
rule.rationale: OWASP Container Top 10 C5 (minimize attack surface).

rule.statement: If the Dockerfile is hand-authored by a senior engineer with image-signing in place, OR the image is build-once-throwaway, the methodology returns `skipped` and the agent moves on.
rule.rationale: Avoids review fatigue on low-blast-radius images.
